items.title: Procter & Gamble’s AI Shift And What It Means For Shareholders
items.description: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is outlining a push into technology enabled innovation and AI powered operations, as discussed by its CEO and CFO at the CAGNY conference. Leadership highlighted four major growth interventions and a plan to operate as a technology enabled consumer platform. The company is focusing on AI powered product development and more autonomous supply chain management as part of an updated growth model. For investors watching NYSE:PG at a share price of $163.51, this shift...

items.title: Q4 Earnings Highlights: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Vs The Rest Of The Household Products Stocks
items.description: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the household products industry, including Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) and its peers.

items.title: Gain® Invites You to Sniff the Difference with New Gain Plus Collection and Upgraded Core Favorites
items.description: CINCINNATI, March 02, 2026--Gain, the go-to detergent known for spreading joy through long-lasting, irresistible scents is turning up the fragrance, freshness, and cleansing power with the introduction of Gain Plus—so consumers can truly Sniff the Difference. This new collection features a packaging design refresh, and breakthrough formulas with advanced cleaning and scent performance – a scent difference you not only smell but also feel. items.title: 189-year-old Dividend King unveils $10 billion payout plan
items.description: Procter & Gamble has been paying dividends for more than a century. In 2026, it made one of its biggest shareholder commitments ever. The Dow Jones Dividend King is the consumer goods giant behind Tide, Pampers, Gillette, and dozens of other household brands. It recently disclosed plans ...

items.title: Spruce Weed & Grass Killer Lets One More Dog Out of the House
items.description: CINCINNATI, March 02, 2026--After famously solving one of pop culture’s greatest mysteries by unveiling "Spruce Let The Dogs Out," Spruce Weed & Grass Killer is ready to unleash its next big move. Today, the P&G Ventures brand is expanding its pack with the introduction of a new mascot: Bruce the Spruce Dog!

items.title: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: Contineum Therapeutics, Suzano, PepsiCo in Focus
items.description: Contineum Therapeutics surged 27% after a Zacks Rank upgrade, spotlighting how Zacks' strategies are beating a volatile market.
